entries.name: eht_m87_shadow_inferred_z_lower
entries.note: Conservative inferred lower-bound proxy from resolved M87* ring morphology (42±3 uas) under no-horizon compact-star mapping.

entries.name: eht_sgra_shadow_inferred_z_lower
entries.note: Conservative inferred lower-bound proxy from Sgr A* ring diameter (51.8±2.3 uas) under no-horizon compact-star mapping.

entries.name: lvk_gwtc3_no_echo_inferred_delay_lower
entries.source: LVK Tests of GR with GWTC-3 (LIGO-P2100275)
entries.note: Inferred delay lower-bound proxy: absence of statistically significant post-merger echoes in O3 events.

entries.name: eht_lvk_inferred_npeak_upper
entries.note: Soft inferred upper barrier preventing runaway n_peak while remaining compatible with ring morphology and GW strong-field consistency.
